questions.text: Which of these is a conductor of electricity?
questions.explanation: Copper is a metal and a good conductor of electricity. Rubber, plastic, and wood are insulators.

questions.text: An electric fuse works on the heating effect of current.
questions.explanation: Electric fuse contains a thin wire that melts when excessive current flows, breaking the circuit.

questions.correctAnswer: A magnet made by passing electric current through a coil wound around a soft iron core.
questions.explanation: Electromagnets are temporary magnets that work only when current flows. Used in electric bells, cranes.

questions.text: The longer line in cell symbol represents ________ terminal.
questions.explanation: In cell symbol, longer line is positive terminal, shorter thick line is negative terminal.
